overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character exploring a gothic castle interior. The character transitions from a narrow torch-lit corridor with stained glass windows into a grand hall featuring a massive suspended skeleton exhibit, typical of the Hogwarts Legacy game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the torch-lit corridor toward a large stone archway

entered.detail: large bronze bust of a bearded figure on a stone pedestal
tall gothic stained glass windows depicting robed figures in blue and green tones
lit medieval wall-mounted lanterns casting warm light
framed portrait hanging on the stone wall
arched stone doorway leading to the next chamber

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor illuminated by wall sconces. A large bronze bust stands on a pedestal to the right, while tall stained glass windows glow with blue light at the far end. The stone walls feature framed paintings as the character approaches an arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle hall with suspended skeleton exhibit

events.description: character passes through stone archway from narrow corridor into vast hall with high vaulted ceiling
character turns around to view the hall from a different angle before continuing to explore

agents.ego_description: entering the great hall and walking around to observe the massive suspended skeleton and architectural details

entered.detail: massive skeletal remains of a dragon or large creature suspended from the ceiling by chains
large circular wrought iron chandelier with multiple lit candles hanging from ceiling
long wooden dining benches arranged in rows throughout the hall
ornate stone balustrade on upper level overlooking the main floor
tall wooden bookcase filled with stacked books
arched stone doorway at the far end of the hall with wooden doors

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast gothic hall dominated by a massive suspended skeleton hanging from the vaulted ceiling. The space features rows of wooden benches, iron chandeliers, and a stone balcony. The character explores the perimeter of the room, passing bookcases and wall sconces, eventually approaching a doorway at the far end while the skeleton remains visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, torch-lit gothic corridor into a vast, vaulted exhibition hall. It begins by following the character past a bronze bust and framed paintings, moving through the narrow stone passage toward the blue glow of distant stained glass windows. As the character passes through an arched doorway, the space abruptly expands into a grand hall dominated by a massive skeleton suspended from the ceiling. The camera then tracks the character along the perimeter of the room, gliding past wooden benches and bookcases under the light of iron chandeliers. The movement finally carries the character toward a far doorway while the towering skeletal exhibit remains visible overhead.
